data.name: Catgirls Rhythm Game
data.detailed_description:
Get your fingers ready—this performance requires perfect timing.

Catgirls Rhythm Game is a high-octane musical arcade experience where the beats are hot and the visuals are hotter. We’ve combined addictive, lane-based rhythm gameplay with a gallery of gorgeous catgirls who are ready to move to your music.

This isn't just about pressing buttons; it's about finding the groove. With tens of different tracks and custom-charted beatmaps, every song offers a different challenge and a different reward. As you hit the notes and build your combo, the action on screen heats up, syncing the girls' movements to the rhythm of your play.

🎵 Key Features:

  • Musical Variety: Challenge yourself with tens of different tracks ranging from "Gentle Purr" to "Hardcore Scratch."

  • Over 100 Unique Levels: We aren't kidding about the content. Experience 100+ unique animations and stages, ensuring you never see the same show twice.

  • Sync Your Senses: Gameplay that feels connected. The animations pulse and move with the beatmap, creating an immersive audio-visual climax.

  • Hand-Crafted Charts: No auto-generated mess here. Every note is placed by hand for the most satisfying rhythmic experience.

  • Strictly 18+: All our catgirls are fully mature adults who know exactly how to handle a good performance.

Don't miss a beat. The girls are waiting for the show to start.

data.short_description: A rhythm game where every perfect note gets a reaction. Master tens of unique tracks and over 100 unique stages featuring fully animated, mature catgirls. Keep your combo high to unlock the spiciest scenes—sync your strokes to the beat and enjoy the show.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+ or later
  • 處理器: Dual-core 2.0 GHz
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated or discrete GPU
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
